title: Vanillia 3D-Tools
body:
![Vanillia text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0469bdf76cfdc365cab126c124c5e8742961839.png)
# **WIP**
Vanillia is a recourcepack for 1.21.10 aimed to give all tools and weapons custom (mostly faithful to vanilla) models and textures, and new models and textures for enchanted tools!

(Work In Progress)
